originalTitle: GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE- Season Pass 5 Playable Character #2 [Robo-Ky] Trailer
content: ■Official website: https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/ GUILTY GEAR : the next entry to the series ■GUILTY GEAR Official X https://x.com/GUILTYGEAR_PR ■The fate of the universe will be determined... The story of Guilty Gear, spanning over 25 years, will finally come to a conclusion in “GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-." The trials and tribulations of the series’ heroes and villains will finally be resolved. Discover the astonishing truth awaiting at the end of all things. Check out the play style of the second character in Season Pass 5, Robo-Ky, in this trailer. ■Buy now! https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/buynow/ © ARC SYSTEM WORKS #GGST #GUILTYGEAR #RoboKy
chineseContent: ■官方网站：https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/ 《GUILTY GEAR》：系列的下一个作品 ■《GUILTY GEAR 官方X》 https://x.com/GUILTYGEAR_PR ■宇宙的命运将被决定……跨越25年的《罪恶装备》故事，最终将在《GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-》中画上句号。该系列英雄和反派的考验和磨难最终将得到解决。发现万物终结时等待着的惊人真相。在此预告片中查看 Season Pass 5 中第二个角色 Robo-Ky 的游戏风格。 ■立即购买！ https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/buynow/ © ARC SYSTEM WORKS #GGST #GUILTYGEAR #RoboKy
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
